seoTitle: Polk County School Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Polk County Public Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 28 last day, breaks, early dismissal, storm make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Polk County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 and lists May 28, 2026 as the last day for students with a 150-minute early dismissal. Fall Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 6, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The official calendar lists storm make-up days on November 24, November 25, January 6, and May 28.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Polk County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Polk County Public Schools starts school on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Polk County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Polk County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Thursday, May 28, 2026, with a 150-minute early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Polk 2025-2026 dates are storm make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists November 24, November 25, January 6, and May 28 as storm make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: Students are dismissed 150 minutes early on ten listed dates.

yearNumbers.label: Storm Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Listed make-up dates are November 24, November 25, January 6, and May 28.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.
